---
title: "Miss Lewis"
---

## Miss Lewis

### Description

of Philadelphia

### Biography

Her address was 710 Pine Street, Philadelphia.  CMY sent an illumination to her there by the hand of Alexander Macmillan.  <i>McElroy’s Philadelphia Directory</i> (1860) has ‘Lewis, H. G., wid of Ellis’ at this address, and (1865) ‘Lewis, H. G., gentleman.  Later editions have no Lewises at this number, though CMY continued to send letters to the address until 1879.

### Letters

- Letter from Jany 29th 1879
- Letter from [late October] 1867
- Letter from July 25. 1867.
- Letter from July 12th [1867]
- Letter from Oct 3d 1864

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
